title: Signup via Kong returns access_token from GoTrue
description: POST /auth/v1/signup through Kong with email and password. GoTrue should create the user and return an access_token. This is the first half of the full cross-service flow (signup → get JWT → use JWT on PostgREST). If this passes, Kong is routing to GoTrue correctly and GoTrue is issuing tokens.
author: dlesieur
notes: This test creates a real user in GoTrue's database. If run multiple times, GoTrue should return a 'user already exists' error (which is fine — it means the route works). For idempotent testing, the bootstrap script should clean up test users. Set active once Kong + GoTrue are both running through Kong's /auth/v1 route.
